title: Demonic Turtle halves Atk damage when slower

card.rawText: If this card has a lower SPD stat than your opponent's primary creature, reduce all Atk damage this card receives by 1/2. Inflict the reduced damage back on the attacking creature.

effect.value: Reduce all Atk damage received by 1/2

plan.title: Demonic Turtle halves Atk damage when slower
plan.summary: Verify Demonic Turtle reduces incoming Atk damage by half when its SPD is lower than the opposing primary creature.

notes: Place Demonic Turtle as player_1 primary creature and run a deterministic battle.
If this card has a lower SPD stat than your opponent's primary creature, reduce all Atk damage this card receives by 1/2. Inflict the reduced damage back on the attacking creature.

steps: Run battle where Demonic Turtle is slower.
